taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Proteins, Amino Acid Metabolism, and Immunology (BI5.1-9).

words.clue: Bond linking amino acids in a protein chain
Cyclic pathway in the liver that converts ammonia to a non-toxic excretory product
Haemoglobin variant used to monitor long-term blood glucose control
Inborn error of metabolism causing dark urine on standing due to homogentisic acid
Most abundant immunoglobulin in serum that crosses the placenta
Yellow pigment from haem degradation that causes jaundice
Hereditary haemoglobin disorder common in India causing chronic anaemia
Technique used to separate serum proteins into albumin and globulin fractions
Amino acid whose accumulation causes intellectual disability in PKU
